G0.label:
case succ.zero
α : Type u_1
a : α
n✝ : Nat
a✝ : ∀ (y : Nat), (fun n => replicate n a) n✝ = (fun n => replicate n a) y → n✝ = y
⊢ (fun n => replicate n a) (n✝ + 1) = (fun n => replicate n a) 0 → n✝ + 1 = 0

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
a : α
n : Nat
a_1 : ∀ (y : Nat), (fun n => replicate n a) n = (fun n => replicate n a) y → n = y
⊢ (fun n => replicate n a) (n + 1) = (fun n => replicate n a) 0 → n + 1 = 0
